title: Multi-Claim Submission Requirements
response:
Feedback Summary (1 comments):

General Comments:
1. Note that at this point of time, the email service is not integrated. The final submission feature will be implement later on. Now should forcus on create multiple claim submissions and integrate with the attachment upload module.
